title: Week of April 6, 2026
summary: This week's updates focused on making OpsPal run more smoothly behind the scenes. The platform now automatically fixes missing dependencies when you start a session, preventing common startup errors. We also improved Salesforce integrations by preventing field conflicts with Dynamic Forms and automatically configuring new record types to avoid permission errors.

entries.headline: OpsPal now cleans up temporary files automatically
details: Removes outdated cache files and session data to keep the platform running smoothly
Alerts you if memory usage logs become too large

entries.headline: Salesforce integrations now handle Dynamic Forms and record types better
details: Prevents field conflicts when Dynamic Forms are active on your pages
Automatically assigns new record types to System Administrator profile to avoid permission errors
Improves routing decisions to prevent session interruptions

entries.headline: OpsPal automatically fixes missing dependencies at startup
details: Checks for missing components when you start a session
Installs needed dependencies in the background
Shows clear error messages and fix instructions when manual intervention is needed

entries.headline: Fixed false error about missing packages during startup
